meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Blackberry repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Blackberry Phone Repair Winnipeg | KEY2 & Classic Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Blackberry repair specialists in Winnipeg. Screen, keyboard, battery repair for KEY2, KEYone, Classic, Passport & all legacy models. We keep discontinued devices running!
page.h1: Blackberry Phone Repair in Winnipeg, MB
page.heroDescription: Still using a Blackberry? We've got you covered in Winnipeg. As Blackberry repair specialists, we maintain parts and expertise for all models.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: LCD and touchscreen replacements for KEY2, KEYone, Passport, and all Blackberry models.

services.name: Keyboard Repair
services.description: Physical QWERTY keyboard repairs for KEY2, KEYone, Classic, Passport, and Bold series.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore full-day battery life. Same-day replacement for most models.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Micro USB and USB-C charging port diagnosis and repair.

services.name: Data Recovery
services.description: Recover contacts, messages, and files from damaged or non-booting devices.

services.name: Connectivity Repair
services.description: WiFi, Bluetooth, and cellular connectivity diagnosis and repair.

advantage_pillars.title: Blackberry Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: We continue to support Blackberry devices long after others have stopped.

advantage_pillars.title: Legacy Parts Stockpiled
advantage_pillars.description: We've stockpiled Blackberry parts and maintain supplier relationships.

advantage_pillars.title: QWERTY Keyboard Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized in physical keyboard repairs for KEY2, KEYone, Classic, Passport, and Bold.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

models_description: We service all Blackberry models including Android devices and classic Blackberry OS devices.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Blackberry repair costs depend on parts availability—as a discontinued brand, some components are scarce. iFixit's Blackberry repair guides provide useful reference.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that repairing a legacy Blackberry can cost more than expected due to parts scarcity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense, we'll explain alternatives.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair Blackberry phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few repair shops still specializing in Blackberry devices.

faqs.question: Are Blackberry parts still available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We've stockpiled common Blackberry parts and maintain supplier relationships.

faqs.question: Can you repair Blackberry QWERTY keyboards?
faqs.answer: Yes! We specialize in physical QWERTY keyboard repairs.

faqs.question: How long does Blackberry repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed same-day, typically within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Can you recover data from a dead Blackberry?

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
